name: Flutter Entertainment plc
business: Flutter Entertainment plc is the world's leading online sports betting and iGaming operator. It offers sportsbook, iGaming, and other products such as exchange betting, pari-mutuel wagering, daily fantasy sports, and prediction markets to recreational players. The company operates through brands like FanDuel, Sky Betting & Gaming, and PokerStars across multiple geographies including the U.S., UK, Italy, Australia, and Brazil.

exposures.sentence: We operate some of the world’s most distinctive online sports betting and iGaming brands which offer our principal product categories of sportsbook, iGaming and other products (exchange betting, pari-mutuel wagering, daily fantasy sports (DFS) and prediction markets in the U.S.).

In December 2025, we launched FanDuel Predicts in partnership with CME Group (CME) in five states, beginning a phased national rollout through early 2026 and providing eligible customers with a mobile and web platform to trade prediction markets contracts.

catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, we launched FanDuel Predicts in partnership with CME Group (CME) in five states, beginning a phased national rollout through early 2026 and providing eligible customers with a mobile and web platform to trade prediction markets contracts.

On April 30, 2025, we completed the acquisition of 100% of the outstanding shares of Pluto (Italia) S.p.A, the holding company that owns Snaitech S.p.A (Snai), one of Italy’s leading omni-channel operators in the sports betting and iGaming market, for consideration of approximately €2.3 billion ($2.6 billion).

On May 14, 2025, we completed the acquisition of a 56% interest in NSX Group (NSX), a leading Brazilian operator of the Betnacional brand for a total consideration of BRL 3,799 million ($674 million) comprising of a provisional cash consideration of approximately BRL 1,961 million ($348 million), with a redemption mechanism in the form of call and put options which allows us to acquire the remaining interest in NSX in year five and year ten following the date of acquisition.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Boyd's 5% interest in FanDuel
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025, the Group completed the transaction with Boyd Gaming Corporation to acquire the redeemable non-controlling interest of 5% held by Boyd Interactive Holdings L.L.C. (Boyd) in FanDuel Group Parent LLC (FanDuel) for a consideration of $1,553 million and terminated certain existing market access and retail agreements for an amount of $205 million.

catalysts.event: Cessation of Junglee operations in India
catalysts.sentence: From August 22, 2025, Junglee ceased offering all real-money games in India.
